## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss progress on SentinelOne's CVE database, content strategy, and AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CVE database design review in progress; content generation for 4-5 sample CVEs requested](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [New content strategy shared with 235 finalized topics; Mansi to be POC for CS101 content](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [SentinelOne's AI visibility trending positively, outperforming competitors across 235 tracked prompts](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Access to SentinelOne's CMS still pending for GrowthX team; Ankit to follow up internally](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

## Topics

### CVE Database Progress

  - [Design review underway with Christian (web design) and Patrick (UX)](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Timeline for design finalization: early next week (post-US holiday on Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Request for 4-5 sample CVE articles to be produced by GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
      - [To be reviewed by SentinelOne's security experts](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Content to be uploaded in Figma mockups for visual context](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [GrowthX team to deliver sample CVE content by next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Developer (Nicholas) needs CMS access to map content and understand formatting](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Content Strategy and Review Process

  - [235 topics finalized with keywords and traffic potential](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Google Sheet shared, replacing Airtable for internal management](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
  - [Topics marked as "skip" have reasons (e.g., existing content, potential cannibalization)](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Mansi designated as POC for CS101 content review and internal PMM conversations](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
  - [Feedback on recent blog post:](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [Fill out SEO table for easier review](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
      - [Start articles with definitions/topics for research-oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
      - [Add S1 sections (Mansi to assist)](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Include conclusions and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [Enhance table of contents with more comprehensive research](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
      - [Implement "answering the question" strategy for informational content](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)

### AI Visibility Analysis (Scrunch Dashboard)

  - [SentinelOne's visibility growing slightly over past 90 days](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Outperforming competitors across all 235 tracked prompts](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Nearly 3,000 responses analyzed](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=999.0)
  - [Citations mostly from third-party websites (common for LLMs)](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1023.0)
  - [Importance of maintaining up-to-date profiles on G2, TrustRadius, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
  - [Reddit noted as fast-indexing platform for LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to generate 4-5 sample CVE pages and upload to Figma by next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)
  - [Ankit to follow up on CMS access for GrowthX team members](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement content strategy feedback (SEO table, article structure, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Sydney to share list of tracked prompts with SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin content generation based on new strategy and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/StWmvh3ZaLtvKz_gftp_f1DLVBmRxDAw?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
